channel.title: Comments for page "There Are No Strings On Me"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "There Are No Strings On Me"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: "from a world where the O5 are corrupted as fuck" … is this foreshadowing to the new Djkaktus proposal? +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Aw, we don't get to see the final battle?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I completely agree with the above. The jokes and action come together in a mix that's perfect for the circus theme. I also really loved the judge of the food court — it reminds me of Douglas Adams. But then things like Tom being "skinny, but not evenly" are genuinely… disquieting. It's really well put together overall, and each entry in this series has been even better executed than the last. It's a good climax to Fuller's story, but I'm hoping to see more of Victor and the circus in the future.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's appropriate that you pull off a high-wire act in terms of jokey tone and real stakes. I'm not sure you need the last section, but upvoted for the 8 seconds it took me to get the food court judge, and the slightly shorter time for Herman's losing a foot comment.
